name: io.github.Servosity/salesbuildr-mcp
title: Salesbuildr MCP
description: Every Salesbuildr resource as a scriptable command, plus offline margin and pipeline analytics.

environmentVariables.name: SALESBUILDR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the SALESBUILDR_API_KEY credential for the Salesbuildr MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: SALESBUILDR_TENANT
environmentVariables.description: Your Salesbuildr tenant subdomain (the {tenant} in https://{tenant}.salesbuildr.com).
